Dental Services for Everyday Care and Urgent Needs

We provide comprehensive dental care for patients and families in Columbia, MD — from routine cleanings and exams to same-day urgent visits. Our goal is to help you stay comfortable, confident, and supported with care tailored to your needs.

Emergency Dentistry

Same-day care whenever possible for toothaches, broken teeth, swelling, dental trauma, and other urgent concerns.

Family Dentistry

Routine checkups, cleanings, preventive care, and ongoing support for patients of different ages.

Dental Crowns

Natural-looking crowns that help restore damaged teeth, improve strength, and protect long-term oral health.

Root Canal Treatment

Gentle treatment to relieve pain, address infection, and help save teeth that might otherwise be lost.

Cosmetic Dentistry

Smile-enhancing care that supports confidence with a treatment plan tailored to your needs and goals.

Children's Dentistry

Welcoming visits that help children feel comfortable while building strong dental habits from an early age.

Featured Service Sections

Learn more about some of our most requested dental services, including emergency care, family dentistry, crowns, and root canal treatment. Each section is here to help you understand when treatment may be needed and what to expect.

Emergency Dentist in Columbia, MD

If you have severe tooth pain, swelling, a broken tooth, or a lost filling or crown, it is important to get care quickly. Optimal Dental offers same-day emergency dental appointments whenever possible so patients can get relief and guidance fast.

We welcome both new and existing patients for urgent dental care and focus on restoring comfort, protecting your teeth, and recommending the right next steps based on your symptoms.

Call for Emergency Care

Family Dentist in Columbia, MD

Our office provides patient-centered dental care for families looking for consistent, comfortable visits close to home. From routine checkups and cleanings to treatment planning and oral health education, we work to make every visit smooth and reassuring.

Family dentistry is about long-term care, prevention, and trust. We help patients maintain healthy smiles with practical, personalized guidance and treatment plans that fit real-life needs.

Request a Family Visit

Dental Crowns in Columbia, MD

Dental crowns are often recommended when a tooth is weakened, broken, heavily restored, or needs added protection after treatment. A crown helps restore the shape, function, and strength of the tooth while blending in naturally with your smile.

At Optimal Dental, we evaluate the tooth carefully and explain whether a crown is the best option for long-term support and comfort.

Ask About Crowns

Root Canal Treatment in Columbia, MD

When a tooth becomes infected or deeply inflamed, root canal treatment may be the best way to relieve pain and save the tooth. Many patients are surprised to learn that modern root canal therapy is focused on comfort and preservation.

If you have persistent tooth pain, pressure, sensitivity, or swelling, our office can evaluate the tooth and determine whether root canal treatment or another restorative approach is appropriate.

Schedule an Evaluation

What to Do During a Dental Emergency

  • Call our office as soon as possible and explain what happened
  • Rinse gently with warm water if the area is sore or irritated
  • Avoid chewing on the affected side
  • Use a cold compress on the outside of the face if swelling is present
  • Bring any lost crown, filling, or broken tooth piece if you can do so safely

Meet Dr. Medani

Dr. Medani leads Optimal Dental with a patient-first approach focused on comfort, clear communication, and high-quality care. Every visit is designed to feel welcoming, informative, and centered on your long-term oral health.

Compassionate, Patient-First Dentistry

  • Focus on preventive, restorative, and family dental care

Frequently Asked Questions

Helpful answers for patients considering Optimal Dental in Columbia, MD.

Do you offer same-day emergency dental appointments in Columbia, MD?

Yes. We offer same-day emergency dental appointments whenever possible for urgent issues such as tooth pain, swelling, broken teeth, and lost restorations.

Is Optimal Dental accepting new patients?

Yes. New patients are welcome for emergency visits, preventive care, family dentistry, and restorative treatment.

Do you treat children and adults?

Yes. We provide family-friendly dental care for patients of different ages.

What should I do if I have a broken tooth?

Rinse gently with warm water, avoid chewing on that side, and call our office right away so we can help guide your next steps.

Do you provide crowns and root canals?

Yes. Crowns and root canal treatment are part of the restorative services highlighted in this final site build.

Where is your office located?

Optimal Dental is located at 7060 Oakland Mills Rd #J, Columbia, MD 21046.
